nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Setup and usage guide for the HTTP sink integration test demo, explaining prerequisites and steps to run the RisingWave-to-HTTP-endpoint sinking scenario.

nodes.name: create_mv.sql
nodes.summary: Creates a RisingWave materialized view over the `user_behaviors` source table as the data source for the HTTP sink integration test.

nodes.name: create_sink.sql
nodes.summary: Defines a RisingWave HTTP sink that POSTs materialized view rows as JSON payloads to an HTTP endpoint for the integration test.

nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the `user_behaviors` source table in RisingWave backed by a Kafka topic, providing the upstream event stream for the HTTP sink test.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose setup for the HTTP sink integration test, starting an HTTP server mock, Kafka, and RisingWave to validate end-to-end HTTP sink functionality.
